title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c deaddrop_post: added IID extraction + oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 but missing string.h for memcpy; rate limit still uses global array P2; unprotect always called even if lookup fails P1
description: P1: ctx may be NULL but unprotect not guarded in all paths. P2: needs #include <string.h>. P3: dummy_iid still used after unprotect. P4: no error handling for oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 return value. Follows oscore.h pattern but incomplete for POST.
close_reason: fixed after 3 codereview passes; tests pass
